summary: Tasha, the first daughter of the Nerestas family, is being questioned by Heize Mervinger, who claims to be the Duke of the Shining Star's sister. Heize challenges Tasha to a magic duel to prove her identity, but Tasha refuses, citing her inability to use magic. Instead, they engage in a martial arts-style fight using hammers, with Tasha emerging victorious. Elric Mervinger arrives and intervenes, suggesting that Heize and Tasha have a friendly conversation instead of continuing their fight.
key_moments: Heize challenges Tasha to a magic duel to prove her identity
Tasha refuses to use magic and they engage in a martial arts-style fight
Elric Mervinger intervenes and suggests a friendly conversation
